name: Weights Leak
text1: Model weights from a declared lab were exfiltrated and appeared on encrypted channels. Downloads were detected from multiple countries before the leak could be contained.
text2: Near-frontier weights have been leaked and combined with previously leaked training methods. Multiple groups are fine-tuning the models and publishing improved versions faster than they can be taken down.
image-prompt: A cascade of glowing data streams pouring out of a cracked secure server vault into a dark digital network, the data fragmenting into thousands of threads spreading across a world map, dramatic blue and white light, digital painting, no text
